summary: Bitcoin slid to $63,030 after US-Israel strikes on Iran triggered a risk-off cascade across markets. From there, BTC rallied to $74,000 intraday on Mar. 4, a roughly 17% rebound. title: Stablecoin inflows rebound to $1.7B as Washington battles over yield rules
summary: Messari said weekly stablecoin inflows rose 414% to $1.7 billion as debate over yield-bearing stablecoins continued to stall US crypto market structure talks.

title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $462M as BTC briefly tops $73K
summary: BlackRock’s IBIT led inflows with $307 million as almost all US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded inflows on Wednesday, extending a three-day inflow streak totaling $1.1 billion.

title: Anthropic reopens Pentagon talks as tech groups push Trump to drop risk tag: FT
summary: Anthropic previously secured a $200 million Pentagon contract, and its AI has been used in classified operations, including support for US airstrikes on Iran, the Financial Times reports.

title: Crypto stocks rally as Trump, regulators signal pro-crypto policy shift
summary: Bitcoin has jumped as well, increasing 7.6% in the last 24 hours, while Ether is up more than 8.3% to trade at $2,132.

title: Google uncovers iOS exploit kit used in crypto phishing attacks
summary: Researchers say fake crypto websites deployed an iOS exploit kit capable of stealing wallet seed phrases and other financial data.

title: Altcoin chatter sinks to 2-year low as Bitcoin holds attention
summary: While altcoin interest on social media is at its lowest in 24 months, it could pick up again once Bitcoin’s rally starts to fade, according to crypto trader Michaël van de Poppe.

title: A16z eyes 5th crypto fund as some peers look to new tech: Report
summary: The crypto venture giant has launched a fifth fund with plans to close by mid-2026, according to sources.

title: Bitwise has now donated over $380K to open-source Bitcoin devs
summary: Bitwise has tasked Bitcoin Brink, OpenSats and the Human Rights Foundation with deciding where to allocate its second annual donation to support Bitcoin.

title: Tether invests in AI sleep tracking firm at a $1.5B valuation
summary: The stablecoin issuer led a $50 million funding round for Eight Sleep as the companies explore AI-driven health monitoring and sleep optimization.

title: Europol, FBI wipe major cybercrime forum LeakBase off the web
summary: LeakBase followed RaidForums, a cybercrime marketplace seized by authorities in 2022 that once hosted leaked data from Ledger users.

title: Coinbase, Microsoft and Europol take down phishing service ‘Tycoon 2FA’
summary: Tycoon 2FA accounted for 62% of phishing attempts Microsoft blocked by mid last year, including over 30 million emails in a single month.

title: Big Tech signs Trump pledge to cover their own AI energy costs
summary: US President Donald Trump says AI data centers “need some PR help,” promising that tech giants will pay for their own power to run the energy-intensive projects.

title: Zerohash joins surging list of crypto firms vying for a bank charter
summary: Several crypto companies have secured OCC conditional approval for a banking charter since the GENIUS Act was passed in July, including Circle, Ripple, Bridge and Stripe.

title: Star Trek’s Captain Kirk shows off X Money as limited beta goes live
summary: Screenshots posted by William Shatner reveal cashback rewards, yield on deposits and FDIC-insured accounts for Musk’s new payment platform.

title: Trump sends pro-Bitcoin Fed chair nomination to the Senate
summary: The US president makes it official after previously announcing his pick of Kevin Warsh to replace Fed Chair Jerome Powell in a Jan. 30 social media post.

summary: Kraken has cleared a regulatory hurdle that crypto firms have chased for years: direct access to the Federal Reserve’s core payments infrastructure. summary: Bitcoin rose above $70,000 today for the first time since early February, extending a rebound that is starting to look less like a brief relief rally and more like a market trying to reverse momentum after months of heavy selling. summary: Tether has landed a Big Four accounting firm’s name on a reserve report tied to its US strategy. title: $1 Billion Floods Back Into Crypto Funds, Snapping Five-Week $4B Bleed
summary: CoinShares reported $1 billion weekly turnaround, driven by Bitcoin buying and renewed investor appetite across major markets.
